mapper.select: SELECT * FROM receive_notice_entry WHERE FBillNo = #{fbillno} and FMaterialId = #{fMaterialId}

SELECT rene.FBillNo, rene.F_bzbz, rene.F_hxjq, rene.F_cplb, byml.number as FMaterialId, rene.FMaterialName, rene.FActReceiveQty, rene.FPreDeliveryDate, bd.name as FPriceUnitId, rene.FPriceUnitQty, bd.name as FStockStatusId, rene.FLot, rene.FRejectQty, rene.FRejectReason, rene.FGiveAway, rene.FTaxPrice, bydy.name as FStockUnitID, rene.FStockQty, rene.F_WBZC, rene.F_WBZK, rene.F_WBZG, rene.F_WBZTJ, rene. F_MZ, rene.F_JZ, rene.F_LXZ, rene.F_xsdd, rene.F_lxs, rene.F_ztj, rene.F_mzz, rene.FIsReconciliationing, rene.FRejectsDiscountAmount, rene.FJoinRejectsDiscountAmount, rene.FReconciliationBillNo, rene.FAllReconciliationBillNo, rene.F_KHHH, rene.F_khjc, rene.F_kh1, rene.F_XSY, rene.F_gdy1, rene.F_bzyq, rene.F_tsyq, rene.F_CTt, rene.F_jgdz, rene.F_bcjsd, rene.F_bcjsr, rene.F_bcjsrdh, rene. F_Ckj, rene. F_jgtzyy, rene.Fddshrq, rene.Fxsddh, rene.Fxsddhh, rene.Fcgddh, rene.Fxsbm, rene.Frkshrq, rene.Fzlbzjjsyq, rene.Fbzbzjyq, rene.Fkhywms, rene.F_PEUU_Attachment_ap FROM receive_notice_entry rene LEFT JOIN by_material byml on rene.FMaterialId=byml.k3_id LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on rene.FPriceUnitId=bd.kingdee and bd.category='unit' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary byd on rene.FStockStatusId=bd.kingdee and byd.category='inventory_status' LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bydy on rene.FStockUnitID=bydy.kingdee and bydy.category='unit' WHERE FBillNo = #{billNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO receive_notice_entry ( FBillNo, F_bzbz, F_hxjq, F_cplb, FMaterialId, FMaterialName, FActReceiveQty, FPreDeliveryDate, FPriceUnitId, FPriceUnitQty, FStockStatusId, FLot, FRejectQty, FRejectReason, FGiveAway, FTaxPrice, FStockUnitID, FStockQty, F_WBZC, F_WBZK, F_WBZG, F_WBZTJ, F_MZ, F_JZ, F_LXZ, F_xsdd, F_lxs, F_ztj, F_mzz, FIsReconciliationing, FRejectsDiscountAmount, FJoinRejectsDiscountAmount, FReconciliationBillNo, FAllReconciliationBillNo, F_KHHH, F_khjc, F_kh1, F_XSY, F_gdy1, F_bzyq, F_tsyq, F_CTt, F_jgdz, F_bcjsd, F_bcjsr, F_bcjsrdh, F_Ckj, F_jgtzyy, Fddshrq, Fxsddh, Fxsddhh, Fcgddh, Fxsbm, Frkshrq, Fzlbzjjsyq, Fbzbzjyq, Fkhywms, F_PEUU_Attachment_ap ) VALUES ( #{fBillNo}, #{fbzbz}, #{fhxjq}, #{fcplb}, #{fMaterialId}, #{fMaterialName}, #{fActReceiveQty}, #{fPreDeliveryDate}, #{fPriceUnitId}, #{fPriceUnitQty}, #{fStockStatusId}, #{fLot}, #{fRejectQty}, #{fRejectReason}, #{fGiveAway}, #{fTaxPrice}, #{fStockUnitID}, #{fStockQty}, #{fWBZC}, #{fWBZK}, #{fWBZG}, #{fWBZTJ}, #{fmz}, #{fjz}, #{flxz}, #{fxsdd}, #{flxs}, #{fztj}, #{fmzz}, #{fIsReconciliationing}, #{fRejectsDiscountAmount}, #{fJoinRejectsDiscountAmount}, #{fReconciliationBillNo}, #{fAllReconciliationBillNo}, #{fKHHH}, #{fkhjc}, #{fkh1}, #{fxsy}, #{fgdy1}, #{fbzyq}, #{ftsyq}, #{fCTt}, #{fjgdz}, #{fbcjsd}, #{fbcjsr}, #{fbcjsrdh}, #{fCkj}, #{fjgtzyy}, #{fddshrq}, #{fxsddh}, #{fxsddh}, #{fcgddh}, #{fxsbm}, #{frkshrq}, #{fzlbzjjsyq}, #{fbzbzjyq}, #{fkhywms}, #{fPEUUAttachmentap} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM receive_notice_entry ORDER BY ID DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO receive_notice_entry ( FBillNo, F_bzbz, F_hxjq, F_cplb, FMaterialId, FMaterialName, FActReceiveQty, FPreDeliveryDate, FPriceUnitId, FPriceUnitQty, FStockStatusId, FLot, FRejectQty, FRejectReason, FGiveAway, FTaxPrice, FStockUnitID, FStockQty, F_WBZC, F_WBZK, F_WBZG, F_WBZTJ, F_MZ, F_JZ, F_LXZ, F_xsdd, F_lxs, F_ztj, F_mzz, FIsReconciliationing, FRejectsDiscountAmount, FJoinRejectsDiscountAmount, FReconciliationBillNo, FAllReconciliationBillNo, F_KHHH, F_khjc, F_kh1, F_XSY, F_gdy1, F_bzyq, F_tsyq, F_CTt, F_jgdz, F_bcjsd, F_bcjsr, F_bcjsrdh, F_Ckj, F_jgtzyy, Fddshrq, Fxsddh, Fxsddhh, Fcgddh, Fxsbm, Frkshrq, Fzlbzjjsyq, Fbzbzjyq, Fkhywms, F_PEUU_Attachment_ap ) VALUES
( #{item.fBillNo}, #{item.fbzbz}, #{item.fhxjq}, #{item.fcplb}, #{item.fMaterialId}, #{item.fMaterialName}, #{item.fActReceiveQty}, #{item.fPreDeliveryDate}, #{item.fPriceUnitId}, #{item.fPriceUnitQty}, #{item.fStockStatusId}, #{item.fLot}, #{item.fRejectQty}, #{item.fRejectReason}, #{item.fGiveAway}, #{item.fTaxPrice}, #{item.fStockUnitID}, #{item.fStockQty}, #{item.fWBZC}, #{item.fWBZK}, #{item.fWBZG}, #{item.fWBZTJ}, #{item.fmz}, #{item.fjz}, #{item.flxz}, #{item.fxsdd}, #{item.flxs}, #{item.fztj}, #{item.fmzz}, #{item.fIsReconciliationing}, #{item.fRejectsDiscountAmount}, #{item.fJoinRejectsDiscountAmount}, #{item.fReconciliationBillNo}, #{item.fAllReconciliationBillNo}, #{item.fKHHH}, #{item.fkhjc}, #{item.fkh1}, #{item.fxsy}, #{item.fgdy1}, #{item.fbzyq}, #{item.ftsyq}, #{item.fCTt}, #{item.fjgdz}, #{item.fbcjsd}, #{item.fbcjsr}, #{item.fbcjsrdh}, #{item.fCkj}, #{item.fjgtzyy}, #{item.fddshrq}, #{item.fxsddh}, #{item.fxsddh}, #{item.fcgddh}, #{item.fxsbm}, #{item.frkshrq}, #{item.fzlbzjjsyq}, #{item.fbzbzjyq}, #{item.fkhywms}, #{item.fPEUUAttachmentap} )
